text: you're not paying for those. My best bit of advice to tell you on how to avoid those things is, like.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: You need to treat this agent as if you just hired a teammate or a production artist.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: and they're in the next office, and you need to bring them the assets that they need. You need to set them up for success. If you don't give them enough context, if you don't give them detailed instructions, and if they don't have all the assets that they need to create something.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: you're gonna get something back, the same way you would get something back from a real teammate that you didn't give enough context to. Good in, good out. And a great practice is also saying, before you generate this.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: Ask me, Questions that you need answered in order to complete this task fully.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: check me, basically, that I'm giving you enough. Most of the time, it'll tell you, thank you, here are the questions I need answered before I start. So.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: Agent chats are much cheaper than generations. You can either go… you can even go into brainstorm mode, like down here, you can go into brainstorm mode, and just talk to the agent, and have this, like, strategizing planning session with the agent.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: As opposed to… and then go into create mode, you know? So that you're not spending all the credits up front.

text: And… I used to do what you just said, of, like, you tell me what's wrong.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: But in a sense, it's like, well, I know what's wrong. Let me tell you what is wrong, what's missing from this, from this output. And you know what? I want you to do this again, and do it this way, this time. Add this, remove that, don't, you know, stay away from doing this or that.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: Put yourself in a director's shoes, And…

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: a director who just hired a really, really highly skilled and fast worker, whether it's, you know, a production team or a production artist, however you want to look at it, a DP, however you want to look at it, the more you treat it like a real person.

speaker: Davicho Barona
text: the better outcome you get. And so, what would you do if it was a real person? You know? You set them up for… you give them a brief.

speaker: Davicho Barona
